title: Generic HTTP Channel Config
description: Configuration for the OpenClaw generic HTTP channel plugin using bridge/relay webhook and stream ingress.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the generic HTTP channel is enabled.

defaultAccount.title: Default Account
defaultAccount.description: Default account ID used when the host does not specify one. Must match a real key under accounts.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Per-account bridge and outbound transport settings.

baseUrl.title: Bridge Base URL
baseUrl.description: Bridge or relay base URL used for probe, resolve, stream ingress, and outbound delivery.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Optional shared credential for bridge authentication.

signingSecret.title: Signing Secret
signingSecret.description: Shared secret used for signing outbound and stream transport requests.

inboundSecret.title: Inbound Secret
inboundSecret.description: Optional dedicated secret for inbound webhook validation on the bridge side.

outboundSecret.title: Outbound Secret
outboundSecret.description: Optional dedicated secret for outbound signing when outbound trust is split from inbound.

maxRetries.title: Max Retries
maxRetries.description: Maximum retry count for retryable outbound HTTP failures.
